summary: Successfully tested that policy selection persists across page refreshes. After selecting 'Homeowners' policy type, the value is stored in localStorage under 'insurescope_policyType' key. Refreshing the page preserves this value.

passed: Policy type 'homeowners' is correctly stored in localStorage under 'insurescope_policyType' key after selection
localStorage value persists after page refresh: {"insurescope_policyType":"homeowners"}
